name: paat-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for development workflows and productivity

plugins.name: gemini-cli
plugins.description: Integrate Google's Gemini CLI into Claude Code for second opinions, dual code reviews, and AI-assisted explanations

plugins.name: reddit-fetch
plugins.description: Research any topic using Reddit via Gemini CLI's web access capabilities

plugins.name: tribunal-review
plugins.description: Multi-provider code review — Codex + OpenCode Go DeepSeek + Claude (diff-only) by default, Gemini, OpenCode GLM, Qwen and Grok opt-in, with calling-context arbitration

plugins.name: agent-sync
plugins.description: Generate AGENTS.md from Claude Code project configuration files

plugins.name: browser-test-router
plugins.description: Multi-model delegation for browser testing — Kimi K2.5 (via opencode) for execution, Opus for analysis

plugins.name: saas-startup-team
plugins.description: Autonomous SaaS delivery — routed founder and specialist roles turn market demand into gated implementation, QA, deployment, growth, and maintenance

plugins.name: comfyui
plugins.description: Manage ComfyUI workflows, models, and API — build workflows from natural language, queue executions, monitor progress, and download models

plugins.name: video-guide
plugins.description: Create professional video guides with TTS narration, screen recording, and YouTube upload

plugins.name: google-ads-strategist
plugins.description: Senior Google Ads strategist — iterative campaign design + Chrome-based creation in PAUSED state for investor review. Browser verification via Ad Preview Tool, SERP capture, and Ads Transparency Center. Enforces hypothesis discipline, buyer-intent + product-value gates, and accumulates learnings.

plugins.name: emails-to-github-issues
plugins.description: Turn emails from named senders into GitHub issues — IMAP fetch via Proton Bridge, HTML-body extraction, thread grouping that respects customer-side numbering, inline-screenshot handling, and scope confirmation before writes

plugins.name: analyst-companion
plugins.description: Real-time in-person meeting analyst — live transcription with speaker diarization via WhisperLiveKit, clarifying questions, voice commands with Chrome screen context, and Plane work items at meeting end

plugins.name: silent-failure-scanner
plugins.description: Deterministic diff-time detector for swallowed errors & ghost transactions — flags empty catch / except:pass, removed await, dropped non-2xx responses, and narrative-prose comments across TS/JS, Python, C#, and PHP, with a global PreToolUse commit-gate hook that hands findings to Claude to arbitrate

plugins.name: payment-contract-tester
plugins.description: Research-grounded payment-integration hardening — a skill encoding Montonio/Stripe/Mollie silent-trap knowledge plus runnable contract-test reference fixtures that run green against a correct handler and red against each seeded trap

plugins.name: irreversible-guard
plugins.description: PreToolUse gate that blocks Bash commands with no practical local undo — de-obfuscates ssh/docker-exec transports, heredocs, chains, and env prefixes before matching a tiered deny-set

plugins.name: i18n-parity
plugins.description: Vendorable zero-dependency translation key-parity gate for multilingual next-intl apps — diffs locale catalogs (presence, empty values, ICU args, leaf shape, namespaces) with declarable waivers, wired as a hard CI/pre-push gate

plugins.name: gh-issue-fetch
plugins.description: Fetch GitHub issue details with auth-gated images downloaded locally, plus epic task-list resolution

plugins.name: codex-subagent
plugins.description: Drive GPT-5.6 Sol as scoped subagents with task-routed low-xhigh effort and explicit max/ultra

plugins.name: mission-control
plugins.description: Portfolio supervisor: N-slot scheduler (pinned maintenance slots + priority-ladder slots) + budget governor keeping autonomous SaaS loops running 24/7 from one human-installed cron line, spending zero LLM tokens on scheduling

plugins.name: session-preflight
plugins.description: SessionStart hook running a fast read-only environment preflight — auth commands, expected tokens in shell env and known env files, required CLIs, and a host/user/repo/branch identity line — surfacing failures before the first tool call

plugins.name: safe-text-post
plugins.description: File-based non-ASCII text posting with unicode lint and read-back verification — payloads travel via files, zero-width chars are rejected, and every post is fetched back and byte-compared before reporting done

plugins.name: merge-guard
plugins.description: Post-merge verification tail — flags junk files leaked by squash merges and unintended path changes, checks configurable grep-based business invariants, auto-opens a cleanup PR, and guides an adjacent-behavior regression spot-check

plugins.name: fleet-propagate
plugins.description: Idempotent fleet-wide config propagation — enumerates host, dev containers, init scripts, and creator skills from a per-host manifest, applies marker-delimited managed blocks (rerun-safe), verifies each target, and reports a per-target matrix

plugins.name: multi-model-orchestrator
plugins.description: Route implementation across bounded Codex workers with task-sized reasoning, then run independent Opus and GPT-5.6 Sol reviews
